3246460.name: Munny: the Sea cave
3246460.description:
[ Background ]

The protagonist, Munny, a member of the prestigious Octavia family, renowned for its archaeological legacy, is tasked with investigating ruins located in the middle of the ocean. However, as Munny approaches the destination, no land appears in sight, and the path is blocked by thunder, lightning, and violent storms. Suddenly, an unknown force pulls Munny deep into the ocean. After regaining consciousness and surveying the surroundings, Munny realizes that the place they’ve arrived at is, in fact, the entrance to the long-sought ruins.

[ carve your path ]

Use Munny's unique abilities to solve various puzzles and carve your path.

[ Battles ]

The path to uncovering the truth will not be easy. You will encounter various enemies that threaten Munny, who will constantly obstruct your way. Overcome the dangers from diverse battles and press on towards the hidden truths within the ruins.
3246460.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
